hero.title: Rodyna
hero.subtitle: Pharmacies
hero.description: Your favorite online pharmacy, coming soon. We are building a digital experience designed for your well-being.

about.title: We Care About What Matters Most: Your Health
about.description: At Rodyna Farmacias, we are dedicated to caring for your health and well-being with a professional and human approach. We have years of experience providing trust, quality, and first-class service in dermo-cosmetics and parapharmacy.
about.feature1Desc: Pharmacists and health professionals available to guide you with every question.
about.feature2Desc: We accept a wide variety of health insurance plans and providers at our branches.
about.feature3Desc: Same-day delivery within CABA and Greater Buenos Aires. Also available for pick-up at any of our branches.

branches.title: Our Branches
branches.subtitle: Find the nearest Rodyna Farmacias branch. We have over 30 years of experience.

schedule.title: Opening Hours
schedule.locationDesc: Our branches are located at strategic points across Greater Buenos Aires so there is always a pharmacy nearby.

footer.disclaimer: Responsible sale. If in doubt, consult your doctor or pharmacist. Always read the package insert.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.content: These Terms and Conditions govern the use of the Rodyna Farmacias website and e-commerce platform. By using this site, you agree to comply with these conditions. This document is being drafted and the final version will be published soon.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.
